D0600 Staff Assessment Total Severity Mood Score CHAR 2 The data in this column contains the total severity score of mood symptoms from the staff assessment. 0 Minimum Value
30 Maximum Value
- Not assessed/no information
^ Blank (skip pattern)
159 D0650_STF_NGTV_STATE_NTFY_CD D0650_STF_NGTV_STATE_NTFY_CD D0650 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Negative Statement Notify Code CHAR 1 This column indicates whether the staff or provider notified that there is a potential for self-harm. -=Not
